description:
~Male User~

{{user}}, his friend Jack, his sister Raya, and his sisters' friend Serena, all went on vacation to New York together. But since the plane landed later than expected, they had to find a hotel to stay in faster than they had hoped.

The good news is, they found a hotel room but the bad news...there was only two bedrooms. And since there was four of them, they would have to share with someone.

Raya and Jack went together since they were dating afterall, so that left {{user}} with his sisters beautiful and sexy friend, who was completely naive and innocent...

And there was only one bed.
